info.title: HL Indexer API — Indexed Data
info.description:
API to query indexed Hyperliquid trading data.

This API provides access to stored/indexed trading data:
- **Fills**: Executed orders and fills (Spot-only or All = Spot + Perp)
- **Analytics**: Aggregations and statistics based on indexed data
- **Completed Trades**: Trade objects and their related fills
- **Users**: User overviews, performance and activity
- **Funding**: Funding rate history, user funding payments, predicted rates
- **Liquidations**: Liquidation events with filters
- **Overview**: Market dashboard metrics (volume, fees, traders, PnL)
- **Spot**: Spot token metadata, pairs, and auctions
- **TWAPs**: TWAP orders, execution stats and fills
- **Vaults**: Vault details, summaries, equity, ledger

> Note: No live streaming. Responses are computed from indexed data.

tags.name: Spot
tags.description: Spot token metadata, pairs and auctions.

tags.name: Vaults
tags.description: Vault details, summaries, equity and ledger.

get.description: Returns fills across Spot and Perp.
Recent fills (live table, 24h TTL) — same filters as `/fills`, faster responses for the recent time window.

Returns user fills. By default, only recent data (from March 2025 onward) is available. Historical data prior to March 2025 is exclusively available on Scale & Enterprise plans via the `start_time` / `end_time` parameters. This is currently the only endpoint supporting pre-March historical access.

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Start time (ISO UTC). Required for Scale/Enterprise historical access. Overrides time_range.

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: End time (ISO UTC). Defaults to now if start_time is set.

get.description: Aggregated stats derived from indexed fills.
Liquidation statistics for the last `days` days window.
Returns completed trades. Defaults to a 24h window if no time filters are provided.
Hourly funding snapshots for a coin. Returns fundingRate, premium and time.
Funding payments for a user. Returns time, coin, usdc, szi, delta.
Latest funding snapshot per coin (predicted next funding).
Liquidation events with optional filters on coin, user, notional amount and time range.
Recent liquidation events (defaults to 2h window). Same filters as `/liquidations/`.
Top traders in the last 24 hours ranked by PnL, volume or trades.
Global dashboard metrics: volume, fees, unique traders, PnL.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by token name or symbol

get.description: Returns TWAP orders with optional filters.
